journey.name: Send Message Journey
journey.description: Prueba enviar un mensaje de chat y verificar que la UI responde correctamente

actions.action: Verify that the app is showing the chat screen with the title "AI Chat"
Verify that the text input field with hint "Escribe un mensaje…" is visible
Type "hola" into the text input field
Verify that the message "hola" appears in the chat as a user message
Verify that a loading indicator or AI response appears
